tracks.meaning: a silvery-white metallic element with atomic number 26, widely used in construction and manufacturing
to press or smooth something with a heated tool, typically used for clothing
a metal brace or support worn to correct posture or provide structural support to the body
to strengthen or make more resolute; to harden one's resolve
a golf club with a flat or slightly curved metal head used for long-distance shots
to put someone in chains or shackles as a form of restraint or punishment
a rigid support device used to immobilize and protect an injured limb
a military prison or place of confinement for soldiers
a heated metal plate used in printing or bookbinding to apply pressure or heat
